summary: Implemented parametric surface generators (supershape, Clifford torus, gyroid) in volumetricPoints.ts with proper fill functions. Added weighted shape selection in pointCloud.ts giving parametric shapes ~70% probability on medium/high tier while excluding them on low tier (≤200 points). Applied 1.5x point budget multiplier and 1.3x point size for parametric shapes. Added per-mesh Z offset (-1.5) to bring parametric shapes closer to camera, with shape-aware DoF/fog uniforms (focusDistance=3.5, fogNear=1.5, fogFar=6.0) and additive Z-breathing. Updated adaptive-point-count test to account for parametric multiplier. Build passes, all 2167 tests pass.
